item.title: ValueAct's Morfit announces BlackRock position, says technology can make the company 'more powerful'
item.description: Morfit disclosed the holding for the first time on an episode of 'The Master Investor.'

item.title: Robinhood has struggled amid big crypto declines. Trading the stock using this 'strangle' options strategy
item.description: Michael Khouw breaks down this options trade on Robinhood.

item.title: Hedge fund manager Rob Citrone is short U.S. stocks. Here's why
item.description: The Discovery Capital Management founder and portfolio manager said capital expenditures on AI are risks to major U.S. companies.

item.title: AI Whac-a-Mole takes over the stock market. JPMorgan says these stocks are insulated
item.description: Artificial intelligence first spurred massive gains to record levels in the stock market. Now, AI is taking out equities, one sector at a time.

item.title: Melius upgrades Chevron, sees upside from Venezuela and exploration push
item.description: Melius' updated price forecast implies that shares of Chevron could add 13% from here.
